studies.title:
deprexis®24-NOW
deprexis®24-new online cognitive behavioral therapy with or without pharmacotherapy

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital therapeutic product 'deprexis', as evidenced by the repeated mention of 'deprexis®24' in the title, trial description, and scientific summary. The study examines the application and effectiveness of this online-based psychotherapy program for depression.

_classification.reason: The study collects data under routine conditions over an observation period, indicating an observational design typical of real-world evidence. There is no mention of randomization or controlled trial conditions.
